project: X8 Richards — Unit 3401, 1111 Richards Street, Vancouver BC V6B 0S3
drawings: Gaile Guevara Studio, ID0.00-ID1.51, 'Permit Plan Draft', printed 2025-09-10

lines.desc: Site setup, protection of strata common property, elevator lobby and corridor protection
Elevator booking, material hoisting and restricted-hours premium
Temporary dust walls and protection of retained finishes
Rentals, equipment and site facilities
Strata damage deposit, move-in/out and administration fees
Waste removal — bagged to loading bay, no on-site bin available
Final clean
Site supervision — 20 hrs/week over 17.3 weeks
Remove existing engineered wood flooring
Remove interior partitions, closet walls and doors
Remove existing millwork — W.I.C., vanities, closets, valance and integrated lighting
Remove existing plumbing fixtures — shower, bathtub, two vanities and sinks, kitchen faucet
Door installation — 6 leaves incl. sliding hardware
Door hardware installation
D1 lower bedroom swing door 36" solid core paint grade
D2 lower ensuite sliding door 32" solid core paint grade
D3 ppal ensuite sliding door 52" solid core paint grade
D4 ppal bedroom double swing door 70" — two solid core leaves
D5 ppal bedroom W.I.C. sliding door 42" solid core paint grade
Door hardware — sliding tracks, pulls, privacy sets
New metal stud partitions, acoustic fire batt, 5/8" GWB both sides — types 01-04
Wet-area partitions and furring — 14mm WEDI vapour board to shower side — types W1-W4
Drywall making-good to existing surfaces after demolition and device relocation
Interior painting PT01 — walls and ceilings to match existing colour
Solid wood flooring WD01 — supply and install
Microtopping CONC01 to floors, walls and shower step riser — specialist applied finish
Microtopping CONC01 over existing kitchen cabinetry fronts
M01 lower ensuite custom millwork vanity
M02 lower bedroom custom millwork closet and desk
M02.1 lower kitchen custom wood extension for dining
M03 upper ppal ensuite custom millwork vanity
M04 upper ppal W.I.C. custom millwork closet — two runs
M05 upper stairs custom millwork closet
M06/M07 upper study custom millwork closets 1 and 2
Kitchen modifications — island side gable, pull-out drawers below oven, microwave relocation, cabinet door replacement, top reveal flush
Stone counters with integrated sinks — PF02 and PF07
Bathroom accessories
Mirrors
G1 frameless translucent Starphire tempered shower glazing
Plumbing rough-in and relocation — 8 fixture positions
Raise floor level to shower room area, build-up and drain relocation
Plumbing fixtures supply — wall-mount faucets, shower bar, controls, head
Sprinkler head relocation — licensed contractor, occupied sprinklered highrise
HVAC modifications — ceiling fan relocation, diffuser adjustment
Electrical rough-in, device relocation — switches, outlets, keypads, fire alarm, access points, AV
Light fixtures supply and relocation — recessed and surface spot lights
Low voltage — AV outlets, automatic shade keypads
Appliances
Furniture, window coverings and styling
Balcony and exterior works
Structural alterations
lines.note: NOT INCLUDED — no structural drawings issued

lines.desc: Hazardous materials abatement

assumptions: Priced from a set marked 'Permit Plan Draft', printed 2025-09-10 — ten months old at the date of this estimate and not a final permit issue. Numbers will move if the set has been revised.

Scope area taken as 1,712.54 sq.ft. as stated on ID0.00. The cover splits this as Level 34: 1,381.30 and Level 35: 331.24, which does not appear consistent with the extent of work shown on the upper level plans. Total used, split not relied upon.

Room areas and wall lengths are measured from the drawings. The title block states the drawings are not to be scaled and not to be used to calculate areas, so all quantities require verification on site before this estimate is relied upon.
Grayed areas on ID1.20 are excluded from scope and are not priced.
Programme assumed at 4 months. Site supervision and general requirements are duration-driven and will move with it.
Existing tile floors and the drop ceiling to current extension are retained, per ID1.10 keynotes 15 and 22.
Existing toilet retained per ID1.10 keynote 08.
Building is 2019 construction (VBBL 2019, strata plan EPS7373), so hazardous materials risk is assumed low — but no survey has been sighted.
Work assumed to proceed in an occupied building with restricted working hours, elevator booking, and no on-site waste bin or lay-down area.
All labour estimated at a blended crew rate of $73.88/hr (2026 basis); actual billing at individual role rates.
exclusions: Structural alterations — no structural drawings issued
Strata legal, engineering review or permit application fees
Design fees and consultant coordination beyond normal GC duties
Any work outside the areas shown in scope on ID1.20

questions.q: Is this the current drawing set? The set is marked 'Permit Plan Draft' and printed 2025-09-10.

The cover splits proposed area as Level 34: 1,381.30 sq.ft. and Level 35: 331.24 sq.ft., but the upper level plans show extensive work in the W.I.C., ppal ensuite and study. Please confirm the scope area per level.
questions.assumed: Total 1,712.54 sq.ft. used; per-level split not relied upon

questions.q: PF08 appears as a tag on ID1.20 but is not listed in the fixture keytag legend. What is it?
Microtopping colour and product are TBD. Which system, and is a mock-up required?
What is the total extent of microtopping to walls, as opposed to floors? Wall area drives this line far more than floor area.
questions.assumed: Approximately 1,800 sq.ft. total measured off the finishes plan

questions.q: Are plumbing fixtures supplied by owner or contractor, and is there a specification or budget?
Is there an electrical design, or a fixture schedule? None is included in this set.
Has the strata confirmed working hours, elevator booking procedure, deposit and any hoarding requirements?
Confirm solid wood flooring species, grade and whether it is site-finished or prefinished.
questions.assumed: Prefinished engineered-equivalent solid at $28/sq.ft. supplied and installed

questions.q: Is a hazardous materials survey available? Assumed low risk given 2019 construction.

risks.why: Rate is unverified against a Caisley project. Applied over existing substrates whose condition is unknown until demolition; failure or adhesion issues mean full removal and redo. Wall area was measured off a drawing marked do-not-scale.
No millwork elevations, sections or specifications exist in the set. Priced from plan tags alone. This is the line most likely to move once shop drawings are produced.
No electrical design in the set. Extensive device relocation shown on ID1.30 but no circuiting, no panel information, and no confirmation the existing service supports the changes.
Elevator booking, restricted hours, no lay-down space and bagged waste removal are all productivity penalties that Caisley's historical rates — derived from detached house work — do not carry.
Carried as a $9,000 allowance. Extent is genuinely unknowable until walls are opened, and ID1.10 instructs the contractor to verify existing conditions on site.
Occupied sprinklered highrise. Requires a licensed contractor, strata coordination and system shutdown windows. Provisional only — no design issued.

risks.item: Drawing set is ten months old and marked draft
risks.why: Design development between issues routinely moves numbers. This estimate should be re-priced against the current set before it is relied upon commercially.
